heading: Definitions
label: 10013 Definitions

amendments: References in Text, referred to in par. (6), was in the original a reference to , which was renumbered section 8101 by , , .Section 7801 of this titlesection 9101 of Pub. L. 89–10Pub. L. 114–95, title VIII, § 8001(a)(1)129 Stat. 2089Dec. 10, 2015

children.text: the terms “elementary education” and “secondary education” have the meaning given such terms under State law;

children.label: A
children.text: that serves not fewer than 10,000 children from families with incomes below the poverty line; or

children.label: B
children.text: for which not less than 20 percent of the children served by the agency are from families with incomes below the poverty line;
the term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given such term in ;section 1001 of this title
the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Education;
the term “State” means each of the 50 States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; and
any other term used that is defined in section 7801 of this title shall have the meaning given the term in such section.1See References in Text note below.1
